summary: Good‑quality audience recording of a very solid show, with only a few dropouts.
review: Both reviewers praise this AUD source as fantastic and the best‑sounding version available for the concert, noting that the performance itself was very good. The only technical drawback mentioned is a handful of dropouts, but they do not detract significantly from overall enjoyment.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 4‑star reviews highlight a very good performance and a solid audience recording; minor dropouts keep the rating just below top tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: A few dropouts noted, but overall crisp and fantastic sound for an AUD source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the show as very good with no specific complaints about pacing or song transitions.
